messages.text: Welcome to LW Schedule v3 — faster, cleaner, and easier to customize.
Got a suggestion or found a bug? Send feedback here:
Add your classes in Settings so Period 1–6 show your actual course names.
Turn on clubs in Settings to show meeting times directly on Today and Week.
Phone Caddy reminders can notify you 1 minute before class starts and ends.
Pack-Up reminders support quick presets: Off, 1, 3, 5, 7, or 10 minutes.
Use Week view to preview all five school days at a glance, including clubs.
Month view highlights special schedules and holidays so nothing sneaks up on you.
Pilot 3 and SBA weeks are auto-detected by date — no manual switch needed.
Install LW Schedule to your home screen for a full-screen app experience.
Holidays and events update from app data files, so you always see current info.
Tip: If something looks stale, reload once to refresh cached files after updates.
